module.description: RBAC privileged, users, roles and permissions.

common.name: Name
common.slug_hint_role: Lowercase, hyphens only. Used in code: RoleMiddleware(roles:'privileged')
common.slug_hint_permission: Lowercase, hyphens only. Used in code: RoleMiddleware(permissions:'manage-users')

permission_descriptions.manage_roles: Create, edit and delete roles and permissions.

roles.title: Roles
roles.hero_lede: System role catalog for access control, related permissions, and privileged maintenance.
roles.empty_description: Create the first role before assigning permissions or users.
roles.listing_description: Compact view for editing, permissions and privileged maintenance.
roles.search_placeholder: Search by name, slug or description

form.hero_lede: Define the role name, slug, and operational description.

identity.title: Role identity
identity.description: Name, slug and baseline data of the privileged role.

organization.section_description: Optional institutional metadata for display, reporting and future catalogs. Permissions still decide access.
organization.scope_help: Classifies the role in a configured institutional axis such as authority, training or readiness.
organization.level_help: Select the configured level, rank or grade used for badges and organizational context.
organization.units_help: Select one or more horizontal units, such as departments, teams, services or regions.

organization_hierarchy.title: Organization Hierarchy
organization_hierarchy.description: Configure organizations, horizontal units, hierarchy scopes and levels used by role classification.
organization_hierarchy.organizations_help: Create the institutional container before adding scopes, levels or units.
organization_hierarchy.label: Label

messages.invalid_key: Use lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens for keys.
messages.save_failed: Organization hierarchy metadata could not be saved.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.assignment_description: Synchronize available permissions against the selected role.
permissions.empty_description: No permissions are loaded yet in the current catalog.
permissions.listing_description: Compact listing for maintenance, editing and cleanup of the catalog.
permissions.search_placeholder: Search by name, slug or description

permission_form.hero_lede: Create or adjust atomic permissions for later assignment to roles.

identity.title: Permission identity
identity.description: Define the atomic permission and its canonical slug.

details.title: Operational context
details.description: Optional description for privileged and support.

users.title: Users
users.hero_lede: Basic management of users registered in the system.
users.register_description: Create users from the privileged area and assign an initial role.
users.listing_description: From here you can review users and manage their roles.
users.empty_description: Create the first user from the privileged form.

help.password: Use a secure temporary password. The user will be able to change it later.
help.onboarding: Catalyst will generate an internal temporary credential, email a secure password setup link, and optionally include email verification. The administrator never sees or chooses the user's password.
help.role: This role will be stored in the user_roles pivot table.
help.email_verified: For users created by privileged, the practical default is to mark them as verified.

messages.load_error: The user list could not be loaded:
messages.email_exists: A user with that email address is already registered.
messages.create_error: The user could not be created:
messages.created_onboarding_sent: User registered and onboarding email sent.
messages.created_onboarding_mail_failed: User registered, but onboarding email could not be sent. Review mail configuration and resend onboarding before sharing access.

enroll.audit_note: Privileged enrollment is validated, logged and redirected through the users catalog.

sections.identity_description: Register the minimum account identity required by the framework.
sections.security_description: Catalyst creates a secure setup link instead of exposing a password to administrators.
sections.access_description: Assign the starting role and verification state for this user.
